commands.review_summary:
The branch changes shared OpenAI Responses stream handling so empty or missing `function_call_arguments.done.arguments` no longer replaces buffered tool-call JSON, and adds regression coverage for both LM Studio-style done shapes.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +106. Total +113 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main and v2026.6.1 overwrite buffered arguments in the done handler, then finalize to `{}` when no usable final args remain. I did not run a live LM Studio model in this read-only review.
